Morphing square, segmented scaling, and unfold transformations for KinoReel animations in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[morph_square.c](morph_square.c.md)**: Implements a morphing square transformation for KinoReel animations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[morph_square.h](morph_square.h.md)**: Function to create a KinoReel that morphs an image to a square or uses a square as an intermediate.
- **[scale_segmented.c](scale_segmented.c.md)**: Implements segmented scaling transformations for KinoReel animations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[scale_segmented.h](scale_segmented.h.md)**: Defines functions and structures for creating and configuring segmented scaling animations in KinoReels.
- **[transform.c](transform.c.md)**: Implements transformations for KinoReel animations, including frame and duration management.
- **[transform.h](transform.h.md)**: Defines a framework for creating and managing transform animations using Kino Reels.
- **[unfold.c](unfold.c.md)**: Functions for creating and configuring a KinoReel animation with unfolding effects and angle-based delays.
- **[unfold.h](unfold.h.md)**: Defines constants and functions for creating and configuring a KinoReel with unfold animation effects.
